hook.summary: Cinematic reveal of the DualSense controller with bold text about PC immersion.
hook.visual_action: The controller appears in a glowing blue frame with floating geometric shapes.

scene_flow: Introductory reveal of the DualSense controller with immersion-focused text.
High-octane gameplay footage from Death Stranding 2 showcasing cinematic quality.
Graphic interlude explaining haptic feedback and adaptive trigger features.
Fast-paced action sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 demonstrating gameplay intensity.
Closing branding with the controller, 'PC READY' messaging, and PlayStation logo.
audience_proxy: Hardcore PC gamers who value high-end peripherals and immersive gameplay experiences.
